data.current_description: Retrieve tests and filter them according to divisionId, productId, parentFolderId, statusId, name, url, type, monitor, pageNumber and pageSize.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve and filter tests with pagination
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of tests filtered by multiple criteria including division, product, folder, status, name, URL, type, and monitor settings. Supports filtering by divisionId, productId, parentFolderId, statusId, name, url, type, and monitor parameters. Returns a paginated collection of test results with the specified pageNumber and pageSize.

data.current_description: Modify a test's detail based on Id. To create a new test, use test id "0" in the request JSON and endpoint url. The startTime and endTime should be in UTC Timezone.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new test or modifies an existing test's configuration. To create a new test, use test ID "0" in the request body and URL. To modify an existing test, provide its ID. Accepts a test object with configuration details. The startTime and endTime fields must be provided in UTC timezone. Returns the modified or newly created test object with confirmation of changes.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description explains the dual purpose (create/modify) and timezone requirement but lacks clarity on request/response formats and what fields are modifiable. Added summary and expanded description to clarify both creation and modification workflows, input requirements, and expected response for better AI agent interpretability.
